About: It is about the rising popularity of the synthwave music genre.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the horror film genre.
It is associated with Dario Argento.
It is associated with John Carpenter.
It is associated with Hans Zimmer.
It is associated with Carpenter Brut.
It is associated with DragonForce.
It is associated with the Devin Townsend Project.
It is associated with Magic Sword.
It is associated with Daniel Deluxe.
It is associated with John Terry.
ConsistsOf: It consists of Justin Pointer and Tony Kim.
FoundedBy: It was founded by Justin Pointer and Tony Kim.
HasA: It has energetic live performances with guitars and synths.
It has a distinct style noted in interviews for its record and merchandise art.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a blend of metal and synthwave.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by horror movies.
It was influenced by Dario Argento.
It was influenced by John Carpenter.
It was influenced by Hans Zimmer.
It was influenced by Metallica.
It was influenced by The Rolling Stones.
It was influenced by Daft Punk.
It was influenced by Queen.
It was influenced by Mötley Crüe.
It was influenced by Luniz.
IsA: It is an American music duo.
KnownFor: It is known for its music.
It is known for energetic live performances.
It is known for its distinct record and merchandise art style.
OccurredIn: It occurred in 2013.
It occurred in 2014.
It occurred in 2015.
It occurred in 2016.
It occurred in 2017.
It occurred in 2018.
It occurred in 2019.
It occurred in 2020.
It occurred in 2021.
It occurred in 2022.
PartOf: It is part of the 2019 documentary film The Rise of the Synths.
It is part of the soundtrack for The Rise of the Synths.
PublishedAs: It was published as an album.
It was published as an EP.
It was published as a single.
It was published as a remix.
PublishedBy: It was published by Neuropa Records.
UsedFor: It is used for jamming and passing around riffs and samples.
It is used for energetic live performances.
UsedIn: It is used in live performances.
It is used in the 2019 documentary film The Rise of the Synths.
It is used on the soundtrack for The Rise of the Synths.
